title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 251.240 - State office in Jefferson City
text:
251.240.  State office in Jefferson City. — The division of facilities management, design and construction shall furnish office space for the state office; the headquarters office shall be located in Jefferson City, Missouri.
(L. 1965 2d Ex. Sess. p. 908 § 34, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
